sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n36036" key="e)/nsarkos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἔνσαρκος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n36036.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of flesh,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἔ. βορά</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">flesh</tr_> meat, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2034.tlg003:1:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Porph.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Abst.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.1</biblScope></bibl>, cf. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0530.tlg006:3:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Gaur.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
